5.1.8.1 Power
Function Description
Computes exponentiation element-wise. Three types of APIs are provided. Their
processing logic is as follows:
Prototype
● Power(dstTensor, srcTensor1, srcTensor2)
– Pass the temporary space through the sharedTmpBuffer input
parameter.
▪ All or part of the source operand tensors are involved in
computation.
